---
layout: home
author_profile: false
---

<!-- ========== JOURNEY (Swimlane + Compact) ========== -->
<section class="lt-section lt-fade-in">
  <h2 class="lt-section__title">Journey</h2>
  <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#4a5568;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1rem">From translation studies to AI-mediated learning design, every step has brought me closer to one goal: becoming an instructional designer who harnesses AI to create equitable, human-centered learning experiences at scale. <strong>The globe below traces this trajectory across five countries; click a stop to see what each place gave me. The timeline that follows lays out the year-by-year details.</strong></p>
  <style>
    .jny-filters{display:flex;gap:.4rem;margin-bottom:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .jny-fbtn{border:none;padding:.3rem .7rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
    .jny-fbtn.active{color:#fff!important;background:#1a1a2e!important}
    .jny-wrap{-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;position:relative}
    .jny-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
    .jny-table th{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;padding:.6rem .4rem;text-align:center;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;color:#94a3b8;position:sticky;top:0;background:#fff;z-index:2}
    .jny-table th.jny-now{color:#5b21b6;position:relative}
    .jny-table th.jny-now::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-2px;left:20%;right:20%;height:3px;background:#8b5cf6;border-radius:2px}
    .jny-table td{padding:.4rem .3rem;vertical-align:middle;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;transition:background .3s}
    .jny-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(0,0,0,.015)}
    .jny-table tr.jny-dimmed td{opacity:.12;transition:opacity .4s}
    .jny-cat{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;padding-right:.6rem}
    .jny-cat-dot{display:inline-block;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;margin-right:5px;vertical-align:middle}
    .jny-tipwrap{position:relative;display:inline-block}
    .jny-chip{display:inline-block;border-radius:8px;padding:.4rem .6rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;color:#1a1a2e;line-height:1.3;cursor:default;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;margin:2px 0;text-decoration:none;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .jny-chip::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px}
    .jny-chip:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
    .jny-chip small{display:block;font-size:.58rem;font-weight:400;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:.1rem}
    .jny-chip.highlight{border-width:2px;font-size:.72rem}
    .jny-chip.upcoming{border-style:dashed}
    .jny-chip.c-edu::after{background:#8b5cf6} .jny-chip.c-pub::after{background:#3b82f6}
    .jny-chip.c-talk::after{background:#f59e0b} .jny-chip.c-work::after{background:#14b8a6}
    .jny-chip.c-award::after{background:#ec4899}
    .jny-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:.5rem;font-weight:700;padding:.1rem .35rem;border-radius:4px;margin-left:.3rem;vertical-align:middle;letter-spacing:.03em}
    .jny-tip{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(.9);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;background:#fff;color:#475569;font-size:.62rem;line-height:1.5;padding:.55rem .75rem;border-radius:10px;white-space:nowrap;z-index:20;transition:opacity .25s,transform .25s;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12);border:1px solid #e2e8f0}
    .jny-tip::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:100%;left:var(--ax,50%);transform:translateX(-50%);border:5px solid transparent;border-bottom-color:#fff}
    .jny-tip.jsfix{position:fixed;left:auto;top:auto;transform:scale(.9)}
    .jny-tipwrap:hover .jny-tip.jsfix{transform:scale(1)}
    .jny-tip.above::after{bottom:auto;top:100%;border-bottom-color:transparent;border-top-color:#fff}
    .jny-tip strong{color:#1a1a2e}
    .jny-tipwrap:hover .jny-tip{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1)}
    .jny-frame{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:1.2rem;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);border:1px solid #e2e8f0;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .jny-frame::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0D9488,#7C3AED,#0369A1,#EA580C,#ec4899)}
  </style>
  <!-- Filter buttons -->

  <!-- ===== Academic flight map ===== -->
  <style>
    .jmap-wrap{position:relative;margin:0 0 1.4rem;background:#D8ECF7;border:1px solid #cfe3f2;border-radius:16px;padding:10px 8px 2px;overflow:hidden}
    .jmap-land{fill:#CBE8D4;stroke:#ffffff;stroke-width:0.7;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .jmap-stop circle{fill:#fff;stroke-width:2.5}
    .jmap-lbl{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;fill:#1e1b4b;opacity:.34;transition:opacity .5s;paint-order:stroke;stroke:#ffffff;stroke-width:2.5px}
    .jmap-sub{font-size:9px;font-weight:600;fill:#5b5670;opacity:.34;transition:opacity .5s;paint-order:stroke;stroke:#ffffff;stroke-width:2px}
    .jmap-lbl.on,.jmap-sub.on{opacity:1}
    .jmap-route{fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round}
    @media (max-width:600px){.jmap-lbl{font-size:13px}.jmap-sub{font-size:11px}}
  </style>

    </svg>
  </div>
  <!-- ===== 3D Globe (takes over when WebGL is available) ===== -->
  <style>
    .jglobe-wrap{position:relative;display:none;margin:0 0 1.4rem;background:#000;
      border:1px solid #1a2233;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;height:520px}
    .jglobe-hint{position:absolute;left:14px;bottom:10px;font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);pointer-events:none}
    .jglobe-zoom{position:absolute;right:14px;bottom:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;z-index:6}
    .jglobe-zoom button{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);
      color:#fff;font-size:17px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
    .jglobe-zoom button:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.28)}
    .jglobe-card{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:276px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #eee9f6;border-radius:14px;
      padding:14px 16px;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(30,27,75,.3);display:none;z-index:60}
    .jglobe-card h4{margin:0 0 2px;font-size:.95rem;color:#1e1b4b}
    .jglobe-card .yr{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#7c3aed;text-transform:uppercase}
    .jglobe-card p{margin:.45rem 0 0;font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.6;color:#5b5670}
    .jglobe-card .x{position:absolute;top:6px;right:10px;border:none;background:none;font-size:1.1rem;color:#9a96ae;cursor:pointer}
    .jglobe-card .x:hover{color:#1e1b4b}
    .jg-pin{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border-radius:999px;
      padding:3px 10px 3px 4px;font-family:-apple-system,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1e1b4b;
      box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);cursor:pointer;transform:translate(-50%,-130%);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:auto}
    .jg-pin .n{width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#F75092);
      color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;flex:none}
    .jg-pin:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(247,80,146,.5)}
    .jg-pin.future{background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);color:#6d5fc7}
    .jg-pin.future .n{background:#c4b5fd}
  </style>
  <div class="jglobe-wrap" id="jglobeWrap">
    <div id="jglobe" style="width:100%;height:100%"></div>
    <div class="jglobe-hint">Drag to spin &middot; scroll to zoom &middot; click a stop</div>
    <div class="jglobe-zoom"><button id="jgZin" aria-label="Zoom in">+</button><button id="jgZout" aria-label="Zoom out">&minus;</button></div>
    <div class="jglobe-card" id="jgCard">
      <button class="x" id="jgX">&times;</button>
      <div class="yr" id="jgYr"></div>
      <h4 id="jgTitle"></h4>
      <p id="jgDesc"></p>
      <img id="jgPhoto" alt="" style="display:none;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:8px;margin-top:10px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(30,27,75,.18)">
    </div>
  </div>
  <script>
  (function(){
    var wrap=document.getElementById('jglobeWrap');
    var canWebGL=(function(){try{var c=document.createElement('canvas');return !!(window.WebGLRenderingContext&&(c.getContext('webgl')||c.getContext('experimental-webgl')));}catch(e){return false;}})();
    if(!canWebGL) return;

    var STOPS=[
      {name:'Leshan',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-leshan.jpg',lat:29.55,lng:103.77,off:[-14,22],yr:'Hometown',title:'Sichuan, China',desc:'Where everything began, at the foot of the Giant Buddha in Sichuan.'},
      {name:'Mianyang',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-mianyang.jpg',lat:31.5,lng:104.7,yr:'2018\u20132022',title:'B.A. Translation \u00b7 SWUST',desc:'Where language became my first lens. Four years of translation studies in Sichuan.'},
      {name:'Shenyang',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-shenyang.jpg',lat:41.8,lng:123.4,yr:'2022\u20132024',title:'M.A. Interpreting \u00b7 Northeastern University',desc:'Trained as an interpreter, and met the machine translation tools that later became a research question.'},
      {name:'Katowice',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-katowice.jpg',lat:50.26,lng:19.0,yr:'2023\u20132024',title:'M.A. Philology \u00b7 University of Silesia',desc:'Erasmus+ double degree in Poland. Also lectured Spoken Chinese and Academic Writing to 200+ international students.'},
      {name:'Pisa',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-pisa.jpg',lat:43.7,lng:10.4,yr:'2024',title:'10th Intercultural Pragmatics Conference',desc:'First international pragmatics community, in the shadow of the leaning tower.'},
      {name:'Tokyo',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-tokyo.jpg',lat:35.7,lng:139.7,yr:'2024',title:'XXIInd CALL Conference',desc:'Presented human vs. machine interpreting. The talk that grew into the MJSS paper.'},
      {name:'West Lafayette',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-westlafayette.jpg',lat:40.43,lng:-86.9,yr:'2025\u2013now',title:'Ph.D. LDT \u00b7 Purdue University',desc:'Learning Design and Technology with Dr. Victoria Lowell. Home base for everything on this site.'},
      {name:'Las Vegas',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-lasvegas.jpg',lat:36.17,lng:-115.1,yr:'2025',title:'AECT International Convention',desc:'Artificial authenticity and academic integrity in the age of GenAI.'},
      {name:'Chicago',img:'{{ base_path }}/images/journey/pc-chicago.jpg',lat:41.88,lng:-87.6,yr:'2026 \u00b7 upcoming',title:'AECT International Convention',desc:'Next stop on the calendar.',future:true}
    ];
    var ARCS=[];
    for(var i=0;i<STOPS.length-1;i++){
      ARCS.push({startLat:STOPS[i].lat,startLng:STOPS[i].lng,endLat:STOPS[i+1].lat,endLng:STOPS[i+1].lng,future:!!STOPS[i+1].future});
    }

    function loadScript(src){return new Promise(function(res,rej){var sc=document.createElement('script');sc.src=src;sc.onload=res;sc.onerror=rej;document.head.appendChild(sc);});}

    var inited=false;
    function init(){
      if(inited)return;inited=true;
      loadScript('https://unpkg.com/globe.gl@2.31.0/dist/globe.gl.min.js').then(function(){
        wrap.style.display='block';
        document.getElementById('jmap2d').style.display='none';
        var card=document.getElementById('jgCard');
        var globe;
        function showCard(p){
          document.getElementById('jgYr').textContent=p.yr;
          document.getElementById('jgTitle').textContent=p.name+' \u00b7 '+p.title;
          document.getElementById('jgDesc').textContent=p.desc;
          var ph=document.getElementById('jgPhoto');
          if(p.img){ ph.src=p.img; ph.style.display='block'; }
          else { ph.style.display='none'; }
          card.style.display='block';
          globe.controls().autoRotate=false;
          globe.pointOfView({lat:p.lat,lng:p.lng,altitude:0.85},900);
        }
        globe=Globe()(document.getElementById('jglobe'))
          .backgroundImageUrl('https://unpkg.com/three-globe/example/img/night-sky.png')
          .globeImageUrl('https://unpkg.com/three-globe/example/img/earth-blue-marble.jpg')
          .bumpImageUrl('https://unpkg.com/three-globe/example/img/earth-topology.png')
          .showAtmosphere(true).atmosphereColor('#7fb4f5').atmosphereAltitude(0.22)
          .arcsData(ARCS)
          .arcColor(function(a){return a.future?['#cfc0ff','#efe6ff']:['#a78bfa','#FF7AB8'];})
          .arcAltitudeAutoScale(0.38)
          .arcStroke(0.8)
          .arcDashLength(function(a){return a.future?0.22:0.45;})
          .arcDashGap(function(a){return a.future?0.12:0.18;})
          .arcDashAnimateTime(function(a){return a.future?4200:2600;})
          .pointsData(STOPS)
          .pointColor(function(p){return p.future?'#cfc0ff':'#FF7AB8';})
          .pointAltitude(0.015)
          .pointRadius(0.7)
          .ringsData(STOPS.filter(function(p){return !p.future;}))
          .ringColor(function(){return function(t){return 'rgba(255,122,184,'+(1-t)*0.55+')';};})
          .ringMaxRadius(4.2).ringPropagationSpeed(1.6).ringRepeatPeriod(1400)
          .htmlElementsData(STOPS)
          .htmlLat(function(d){return d.lat;}).htmlLng(function(d){return d.lng;})
          .htmlAltitude(0.02)
          .htmlElement(function(d){
            var e=document.createElement('div');
            e.className='jg-pin'+(d.future?' future':'');
            e.innerHTML='<span class="n">'+(STOPS.indexOf(d)+1)+'</span>'+d.name;
            if(d.off){e.style.transform='translate('+d.off[0]+'px,'+d.off[1]+'px)';}
            e.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();showCard(d);});
            return e;
          })
          .onPointClick(showCard);
 /* NASA-style lighting: stronger sun, dimmer ambient, ocean glint */
        try{
          var mat=globe.globeMaterial();
          if(mat.specular&&mat.specular.set){mat.specular.set('#3d5f96');}
          mat.shininess=14;
          globe.scene().traverse(function(o){
            if(o.isAmbientLight){o.intensity=0.75;}
            if(o.isDirectionalLight){o.intensity=1.7;o.position.set(-0.8,1.4,0.9);}
          });
        }catch(e){}
        globe.controls().autoRotate=!matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
        globe.controls().autoRotateSpeed=0.5;
        globe.controls().enableZoom=true;
        globe.controls().minDistance=185; /* closest: street-of-the-globe detail */
        globe.controls().maxDistance=420;
        globe.controls().minPolarAngle=Math.PI*0.16; /* keep the northern hemisphere in frame */
        globe.controls().maxPolarAngle=Math.PI*0.60;
        globe.pointOfView({lat:32,lng:95,altitude:2.4},0);
        function resize(){globe.width(wrap.clientWidth).height(wrap.clientHeight);}
        resize();addEventListener('resize',resize);
        function zoomBy(f){
          var pov=globe.pointOfView();
          globe.pointOfView({altitude:Math.min(2.6,Math.max(0.6,pov.altitude*f))},300);
        }
        document.getElementById('jgZin').addEventListener('click',function(){zoomBy(0.72);});
        document.getElementById('jgZout').addEventListener('click',function(){zoomBy(1/0.72);});
        document.getElementById('jgX').addEventListener('click',function(){
          card.style.display='none';
          globe.pointOfView({altitude:2.4},900);
          globe.controls().autoRotate=!matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
        });
            }).catch(function(e){});
    }
    var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(en){ if(en[0].isIntersecting){ init(); obs.disconnect(); } },{rootMargin:'300px'});
    obs.observe(document.getElementById('jmap2d'));
  })();
  </script>

  <script>
  (function(){
    var svg=document.getElementById('jmap');
    function el(t,a){var e=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',t);for(var k in a)e.setAttribute(k,a[k]);return e;}
    var reduced=matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

    var STOPS=[
      {n:'Leshan',s:'Hometown',x:721.1,y:118.8,lx:-58,ly:14},
      {n:'Mianyang',s:'B.A. · SWUST',x:723.6,y:113.6,lx:8,ly:26},
      {n:'Shenyang',s:'M.A. · NEU',x:773.3,y:86,lx:10,ly:-6},
      {n:'Katowice',s:'M.A. + Lecturer',x:496.2,y:63.4,lx:-4,ly:-16},
      {n:'Pisa',s:'IPC \u201924',x:473.4,y:81,lx:-38,ly:16},
      {n:'Tokyo',s:'CALL \u201924',x:816.5,y:102.3,lx:12,ly:12},
      {n:'West Lafayette',s:'Ph.D. · Purdue',x:215.2,y:89.7,lx:12,ly:-12},
      {n:'Las Vegas',s:'AECT \u201925',x:140.4,y:101.1,lx:-72,ly:26},
      {n:'Chicago',s:'AECT \u201926',x:213.4,y:85.8,lx:16,ly:34,future:1}
    ];
 /* pieces: [fromIdx,toIdx] with optional via edge-wrap; stopAfter = index of arrival stop */
    var PIECES=[
      {a:[721.1,118.8],b:[723.6,113.6],stop:1},
      {a:[723.6,113.6],b:[773.3,86],stop:2},
      {a:[773.3,86],b:[496.2,63.4],stop:3},
      {a:[496.2,63.4],b:[473.4,81],stop:4},
      {a:[473.4,81],b:[816.5,102.3],stop:5},
      {a:[816.5,102.3],b:[958,86]}, /* to right edge (Pacific) */
      {a:[-8,86],b:[215.2,89.7],stop:6,teleport:1},
      {a:[215.2,89.7],b:[140.4,101.1],stop:7},
      {a:[140.4,101.1],b:[213.4,85.8],stop:8,future:1}
    ];
 /* quad control point: lifted perpendicular */
    PIECES.forEach(function(p){
      var mx=(p.a[0]+p.b[0])/2,my=(p.a[1]+p.b[1])/2;
      var dx=p.b[0]-p.a[0],dy=p.b[1]-p.a[1],L=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1;
      var k=Math.min(46,L*0.22);
      p.c=[mx+dy/L*-k, my+dx/L*k*0 - k]; /* lift upward */
      p.len=L*1.08;
      var d='M '+p.a[0]+' '+p.a[1]+' Q '+p.c[0]+' '+p.c[1]+' '+p.b[0]+' '+p.b[1];
      p.el=el('path',{d:d,class:'jmap-route',
        stroke:p.future?'#c4b5fd':'url(#jmap-grad)',
        'stroke-dasharray':p.future?'5 6':'0',
        opacity:0});
      svg.appendChild(p.el);
    });
 /* stops + labels */
    var lblEls=[];
    STOPS.forEach(function(st,i){
      var g=el('g',{class:'jmap-stop'});
      g.appendChild(el('circle',{cx:st.x,cy:st.y,r:4.5,stroke:st.future?'#c4b5fd':'#7c3aed',
        'stroke-dasharray':st.future?'2.5 2.5':'0'}));
      svg.appendChild(g);
      var t=el('text',{x:st.x+st.lx,y:st.y+st.ly,class:'jmap-lbl'}); t.textContent=st.n;
      var t2=el('text',{x:st.x+st.lx,y:st.y+st.ly+11,class:'jmap-sub'}); t2.textContent=st.s;
      svg.appendChild(t); svg.appendChild(t2);
      lblEls.push([t,t2]);
    });
    function lightUp(i){ lblEls[i][0].classList.add('on'); lblEls[i][1].classList.add('on'); }
    function resetLbls(){ lblEls.forEach(function(p){p[0].classList.remove('on');p[1].classList.remove('on');}); lightUp(0); }

 /* paper plane */
    var plane=el('path',{d:'M0 0 L-13 5 L-8.5 0 L-13 -5 Z',fill:'url(#jmap-grad)',opacity:reduced?0:1});
    svg.appendChild(plane);

    if(reduced){ PIECES.forEach(function(p){p.el.setAttribute('opacity',1);}); STOPS.forEach(function(_,i){lightUp(i);}); return; }

    function q(p,t){ /* point on quad */
      var mt=1-t;
      return [mt*mt*p.a[0]+2*mt*t*p.c[0]+t*t*p.b[0], mt*mt*p.a[1]+2*mt*t*p.c[1]+t*t*p.b[1]];
    }
    var pi=0,t=0,pause=0,SPEED=2.2;
    lightUp(0);
    (function tick(){
      if(pause>0){ pause--; requestAnimationFrame(tick); return; }
      var p=PIECES[pi];
      p.el.setAttribute('opacity',1);
      if(!p.future){
        var total=p.el.getTotalLength();
        p.el.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray',total);
        p.el.setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset',total*(1-t));
      }
      t+=SPEED/p.len;
      if(t>=1){
        t=1;
        var pos=q(p,1);
        if(!p.future) p.el.setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset',0);
        if(p.stop!==undefined){ lightUp(p.stop); pause=52; }
        pi++;
        if(pi>=PIECES.length){
          pause=170; pi=0; t=0;
          setTimeout(function(){ PIECES.forEach(function(pp){pp.el.setAttribute('opacity',0);
            if(!pp.future){pp.el.setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset',pp.el.getTotalLength());}}); resetLbls(); }, 2400);
          requestAnimationFrame(tick); return;
        }
        t=0;
      }
      var pos=q(p,Math.min(t,1)), pos2=q(p,Math.min(t+0.02,1));
      var ang=Math.atan2(pos2[1]-pos[1],pos2[0]-pos[0])*180/Math.PI;
      plane.setAttribute('transform','translate('+pos[0]+','+pos[1]+') rotate('+ang+')');
      requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    })();
  })();
  </script>

  <div class="jny-filters">
    <button class="jny-fbtn active" onclick="jnyFilter('all',this)">All</button>
    <button class="jny-fbtn" style="background:#f5f3ff;color:#8b5cf6" onclick="jnyFilter('edu',this)">Education</button>
    <button class="jny-fbtn" style="background:#eff6ff;color:#3b82f6" onclick="jnyFilter('pub',this)">Publications</button>
    <button class="jny-fbtn" style="background:#f0fdfa;color:#14b8a6" onclick="jnyFilter('work',this)">Experience</button>
    <button class="jny-fbtn" style="background:#fffbeb;color:#d97706" onclick="jnyFilter('talk',this)">Talks</button>
    <button class="jny-fbtn" style="background:#fdf2f8;color:#ec4899" onclick="jnyFilter('award',this)">Awards</button>
  </div>
  <div class="jny-frame">
  <div class="jny-wrap">
    <table class="jny-table">
      <thead><tr><th></th><th>2022</th><th>2023</th><th>2024</th><th>2025</th><th class="jny-now">2026</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr data-cat="edu">
          <td class="jny-cat" style="color:#8b5cf6"><span class="jny-cat-dot" style="background:#8b5cf6"></span>Education</td>
          <td><span class="jny-tipwrap"><span class="jny-chip c-edu">B.A. Translation<small>SWUST, China</small></span><span class="jny-tip"><strong>B.A. in Translation</strong><br>Southwest University of Science &amp; Technology<br>Mianyang, China</span></span></td>
          <td></td>
          <td><span class="jny-tipwrap"><span class="jny-chip c-edu">M.A. Dual Degree<small>NEU + Silesia</small></span><span class="jny-tip"><strong>M.A. Interpreting</strong> (Northeastern U., China)<br><strong>M.A. Philology</strong> (U. of Silesia, Poland)<br>Erasmus+ Double-Degree Program</span></span></td>
          <td><span class="jny-tipwrap"><span class="jny-chip highlight c-edu" style="border:2px solid #a78bfa;color:#5b21b6">Ph.D. Purdue<small style="color:#7c3aed">Learning Design &amp; Tech</small></span><span class="jny-tip"><strong>Doctor of Philosophy</strong><br>Learning Design and Technology<br>Advisor: Dr. Victoria Lowell</span></span></td>
          <td></td>
        </tr>
        <tr data-cat="pub">
          <td class="jny-cat" style="color:#3b82f6"><span class="jny-cat-dot" style="background:#3b82f6"></span>Publications</td>
          <td></td>
          <td><span class="jny-tipwrap"><a href="/publication/2023-clil-translation" class="jny-chip c-pub">CLIL<small>Ed. Advances</small></a><span class="jny-tip"><strong>Gao &amp; Tan (2023)</strong><br>MTI talent cultivation from CLIL perspective<br>Education Advances, 13(12)</span></span></td>

  <script>
 /* keep timeline tooltips fully inside the viewport (no clipping by table edges) */
  document.querySelectorAll('.jny-tipwrap').forEach(function(w){
    var tip=w.querySelector('.jny-tip');
    if(!tip)return;
    w.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(){
      tip.classList.add('jsfix');
      var r=w.getBoundingClientRect(), tw=tip.offsetWidth, th=tip.offsetHeight;
      var left=Math.max(8,Math.min(r.left+r.width/2-tw/2,window.innerWidth-tw-8));
      var top=r.bottom+8, above=false;
      if(top+th>window.innerHeight-8){top=r.top-8-th;above=true;}
      tip.style.left=left+'px';
      tip.style.top=top+'px';
      tip.style.setProperty('--ax',(r.left+r.width/2-left)+'px');
      tip.classList.toggle('above',above);
    });
  });
  function jnyFilter(cat,btn){
    document.querySelectorAll('.jny-fbtn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');});
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.jny-table tr[data-cat]').forEach(function(r){
      if(cat==='all'||r.dataset.cat===cat){r.classList.remove('jny-dimmed');}else{r.classList.add('jny-dimmed');}
    });
  }
  </script>
</section>
